title: Rich Argentinian Tofu Mousse
description: A cultured, gooey, indulgent Argentinian-inspired tofu mousse flavored with kabse pepper and tempered dark chocolate.
instructions: Press the tofu to remove excess moisture for 10 minutes.
Melt the chocolate in a heatproof bowl over a pot of simmering water.
Whisk the coconut cream, vanilla extract, maple syrup, sea salt, and kabse pepper powder until fully blended.
Fold the melted chocolate into the tofu using a hand mixer until smooth.
Fold the coconut cream mixture into the tofu and chocolate until the mousse is silky.
Transfer the mousse into individual ramekins and chill in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
Before serving, top each mousse with roasted coconut flakes for crunch.
Serve chilled for an indulgent, creamy dessert experience.
